calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER
Off Calendar May-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roman Zhuk, Esq., Fine, boggs & Perkins, Telephone 650-712-8908, appearing for petitioner Frank Zeidan; (CourtCall)
Joe Lake, Esq., Deputy City of Attorney, CCSF, Telephone 415-554-4217 appearing for Defendant/respondent CCSF;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument
rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF LABOR MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER

Granted without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)

DEMURRER
Off Calendar May-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roman Zhuk, Esq., Fine, boggs & Perkins, Telephone 650-712-8908, appearing for petitioner Frank Zeidan; CourtCall
Joe Lake, Esq., Deputy City of Attorney, CCSF, Telephone 415-554-4217 appearing for Defendant/respondent CCSF;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF LABOR'S DEMURRER.

Sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)
